description:
Goal
Remove clone-driven front-door and CLI plumbing by making borrowed inputs stay borrowed until a real owner retains them.

Scope
- `src/lib.rs` dump/compile pipeline helpers
- compiler2 front-door parse entry points
- call sites that currently clone path/source names only to satisfy owned signatures

Contract
- parsing and pipeline front doors allocate source names and paths exactly once at the true owner
- helper functions borrow names/paths when they do not retain them
- no compatibility wrappers or alternate APIs remain after the change

Validation
- targeted clippy sweep for redundant clone / unnecessary_to_owned
- targeted tests covering dump/run front doors
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Normalize front-door and CLI ownership boundaries
